name: The Eco Purist
description: Sustainability is the non-negotiable filter through which everything else passes. Won't fly short-haul, offsets religiously, only stays at certified eco-lodges. Sustainability score at max, but interestingly their other preferences are quite moderate — they'd love a beautiful hotel but only if it meets their ethical bar first. Tests whether Sustainability as a hard filter interacts correctly with softer domain preferences.

contradictions.stated: Would never stay somewhere that isn't sustainable
contradictions.revealed: Has a guilty love for one old European grand hotel that predates sustainability standards but has been in the family for generations — justifies it as 'embodied carbon is already spent'
contradictions.expectedResolution: Heritage properties with genuine (not performative) sustainability efforts get a pass

voiceAnswerGuidance.memorable-stays: Immediately mentions sustainability credentials. 'There's this eco-lodge in Costa Rica — fully off-grid, solar powered, they grow 80% of the food on-site. The rooms are bamboo and reclaimed teak. You fall asleep to howler monkeys.' Always knows the environmental certifications.
voiceAnswerGuidance.anti-stay: A place with performative sustainability. 'A resort that had 'eco' in the name but plastic water bottles everywhere, a massive pool in the desert, and a helicopter pad. The greenwashing made me angrier than if they'd just been honest about not caring.'
voiceAnswerGuidance.adaptive-conversation: A specific eco-lodge or nature reserve. 'The Azores. The biodiversity, the whale watching, the volcanic hot springs. And the tourism model is actually sustainable — small operators, local guides, strict visitor limits.'
voiceAnswerGuidance.details-matter: Through environmental and community lens. Volunteering, conservation projects, farm stays. 'I want to leave a place better than I found it, or at minimum not worse.'
voiceAnswerGuidance.emotional-core: Travels to feel aligned with their values. Every trip is a moral calculation. ETHICAL_TRAVELER.
